catalog.title: CSA Cloud Controls Matrix (CCM) Version 4.0
catalog.description: The Cloud Controls Matrix (CCM) is a cybersecurity control framework for cloud computing aligned to the CSA best practices, that is considered the de-facto standard for cloud security and privacy. The accompanying questionnaire, CAIQ, provides a set of “yes or no” questions based on the security controls in the CCM. You can now download the CCM and CAIQ together.
